frameworks.name: working memory
frameworks.one_line: retention of spatial information across a delay in DLPFC and LIP

frameworks.name: reinforcement learning
frameworks.one_line: choice and outcome retained to update reward expectations

core_question: Does spatial memory across different behavioral contexts rely on a shared neural mechanism in DLPFC and LIP?
key_assumptions: DLPFC and LIP are critical for retaining information over a delay
Similar spatial information is used across the three tasks
Memory demands can be separated into prospective and retrospective components
manipulations: task context (ODR vs visual search vs matching pennies)
type of memory demand (prospective only vs prospective + retrospective)
